flashcards.definition: Rough ER: protein synthesis/modification; Smooth ER: lipid synthesis/detox.
Modifies, sorts, and packages proteins and lipids for transport.
Organelle containing digestive enzymes to break down waste and foreign material.
Organelle in plant cells where photosynthesis occurs; contains chlorophyll.
Storage organelle; large central vacuole in plant cells maintains turgor pressure.
